title: Account listing layout and labels

content: 1) There is a layout problem in the accounts display on the left hand side, where the email addresses are sometimes obscured by the titles of the pages (see screenshot). 2) Also, is it possible to adjust the labels of so that they reflect the initials of two-word titles? title: Smartphone SMTP/Pop Configuration
creator: dario_gabrielli64
content:
Hi, I'm trying to enter an existing email address into the Thunderbird app, but after entering all the information, I get this message: "The user is authenticated but not logged in." Since I prefer to use the Pop system, I tried entering the same information but changed the port from 995 to 587, but the error still appears. However, if I enter the correct information via the Pop system, it appears to be the wrong password, but it is, in fact, correct. Both of these issues occur in the app downloaded to my smartphone.

Dario Italy

title: emails not showing in the unified folder
creator: stephen.davies54
content:
I'm using a Samsung Tab S6 tablet with thunderbird email for Android. I have several email addresses to monitor but I've noticed the unified folder doesn't always show emails that are in an inbox in a email address but they are there if I check the email address direct.

Anyone how to fix?
